title: Hero section: mobile text overflow on 375px viewport
body: The bookshop name and tagline overflow the hero frame on iPhone SE (375px). Jonas to adjust clamp() values in the hero CSS override.

title: Stripe checkout: set currency to SEK
body: Payment intent must use SEK, not USD. Applies to book pre-orders and event ticket purchases. Verify Stripe tax settings for Swedish VAT (25%).

title: Staff picks CMS collection: add language field
body: Staff pick entries need a Language field (English / Swedish / German / French) so the site can filter by shelf. Field type: option, required.

title: Events page: date format must be Swedish (dd MMMM yyyy)
body: Event dates render as MM/DD/YYYY. Locale needs to be sv-SE throughout the events collection template.

title: Nav: opening hours not linked to Google Maps
body: The Tue-Sat 10:00-18:00 footer block should deep-link to the Google Maps listing for Svartbäcksgatan 12.

title: Add canonical tag for weaverandbook.se
body: Webflow generates a staging domain URL in some canonical tags. Must point to https://www.weaverandbook.se before launch.

title: Accessibility: image alt text missing on window display gallery
body: Maja Lindqvist's window display photos in the gallery section have empty alt attributes. All must have descriptive Swedish alt text.

title: PR: implement newsletter signup Mailchimp embed
body: Adds the Mailchimp embedded signup form to the footer across all pages. Double opt-in enabled per Swedish marketing law.

title: PR: Stripe webhook handler for order confirmations
body: Webhook endpoint receives payment_intent.succeeded and fires order confirmation email via SendGrid template.

title: Cookie consent banner: must comply with Swedish GDPR banner requirements
body: The existing Webflow cookie banner does not reject all by default. Needs explicit accept/reject with no pre-ticked boxes.

title: Performance: lazy load all images below the fold
body: Lighthouse score shows LCP hurt by eager loading on gallery images. Add loading="lazy" and proper width/height attributes.

title: About page: update shop history text for 15th anniversary
body: The about page still references '14 years'. Update to 15 years (opened 2011). Also add the Oct 17 anniversary event link.

title: contentful_export.py: handle missing ISBN field gracefully
body: Some older Contentful entries omit the ISBN field. Script crashes with KeyError. Add a fallback to empty string.

title: Add dry-run flag to webflow_sync.py
body: Before pushing CMS entries live, need a --dry-run flag that prints diff without writing to Webflow API.

title: Map Contentful author bio field to Webflow rich-text
body: Author bios in Contentful use Markdown; Webflow CMS expects rich-text JSON. Need a converter step in the sync pipeline.

title: 404 page: add Swedish language copy and link back to shop
body: Current 404 is the default Webflow 404. Needs Weaver & Book branding and copy in Swedish: 'Sidan hittades inte. Gå till bokhandeln.'

title: Add Open Graph meta tags for social sharing
body: Staff picks and event pages need og:title, og:description, og:image so previews render correctly when shared on Instagram and Twitter.

title: Staging subdomain: configure staging.weaverandbook.se
body: Need staging.weaverandbook.se pointing to the Webflow staging site so Lucia can review changes without seeing live site.

title: PR: add schema.org BookStore structured data to homepage
body: Adds JSON-LD BookStore markup with name, address (Svartbäcksgatan 12, Uppsala), openingHours and telephone for rich Google results.

title: Event poster image: compress Maja's full-res photos before upload
body: Maja delivers 12 MB TIFFs. Need an automated resize-and-compress step (max 1200px wide, WebP, <200 KB) before CMS upload.
